name: Stained Glass Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl with an electric mixer at medium speed, beat margarine, sugar, honey, egg, and vanilla extract until thoroughly blended.
2. Blend in flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Cover; chill at least 2 hours.
3. On a lightly floured surface, roll out dough to 1/4 inch thickness.
4. Cut dough with cookie cutters into desired shapes.
5. Trace a smaller version of the cookie shape on the dough, leaving a 1/2 to 3/4 inch border. Cut out and remove the center of the cookies. Place the cookie outlines on baking sheets lined with foil.
6. Crush each color of candy separately between two layers of waxed paper using a mallet.
7. Spoon crushed candy into the centers of the cookies.
8. Bake at 350°F for 6-8 minutes, or until the candy is melted and the cookie is lightly browned. Cool completely before removing from foil.
